raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "n must be a non-negative integer",
    "k must be an integer",
    "k must be less than or equal to n"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "result is a non-negative integer",
    "result is the number of ways to choose k items from n items without repetition and without order"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "n is 0 and k is 0",
    "n is 0 and k is greater than 0",
    "k is 0",
    "k is equal to n",
    "k is greater than n"
  ]
}
```
raw_outputs.groq2:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "n must be a non-negative integer",
    "k must be a non-negative integer",
    "k must not be greater than n"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "The function returns a non-negative integer",
    "The function returns the number of ways to choose k items from n items without repetition and without order"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "When n or k is 0, the function returns 1",
    "When k is greater than n, the function returns 0"
  ]
}
```
